ElevateHomes

Portfolio Services Experience Contact

Exceptional Homes for Discerning Tastes

Access the world's most exclusive properties. White-glove service, personalized attention, and unparalleled luxury experiences.

$50M+

Avg Portfolio Value

Bespoke Services

Tailored solutions for the most discerning clientele

Exclusive Viewings

Private showings arranged at your convenience with dedicated agents.

Portfolio Curation

Hand-selected properties matching your exact specifications.

Concierge Service

Complete transaction management from discovery to ownership.

Verified Listings

All properties authenticated and thoroughly vetted.

Featured Portfolio

Curated selection from our exclusive collection

SIGNATURE COLLECTION

Manhattan Penthouse

360-degree city views, private elevator, spa facilities, and climate-controlled wine cellar. Epitome of urban luxury.

5 Bedrooms

6 Bathrooms

8,500 Sq Ft

$45.5M

WATERFRONT ESTATES

Malibu Beachfront Villa

Mediterranean-inspired architecture with private beach access, infinity pool, and smart home automation throughout.

6 Bedrooms

7 Bathrooms

9,200 Sq Ft

$67.8M

CONTEMPORARY LUXURY

Beverly Hills Estate

Ultra-modern architecture with smart tech integration, movie theater, fitness center, and championship tennis court.

7 Bedrooms

8 Bathrooms

12,000 Sq Ft

$89.2M

Unmatched Expertise & Discretion

With over 30 years in luxury real estate, we understand the unique needs of high-net-worth individuals. Complete confidentiality guaranteed.

Global Network

Access to exclusive international properties and investment opportunities.

Personalized Concierge

Dedicated agent available 24/7 for your real estate needs.

Legal & Financial Advisory

Connected with top legal and financial professionals worldwide.

500+

Premium Properties

$2B+

Portfolio Value

95%

Client Satisfaction

30+

Years Experience

Trusted by Industry Leaders

"ElevateHomes provided exceptional service in acquiring our Aspen estate. The discretion and expertise were unparalleled."

Victoria Sterling

CEO, Sterling Capital

"Found the perfect investment portfolio through ElevateHomes. Their market insight is second to none."

Marcus Thompson

Real Estate Investor

"Their concierge service is worth every penny. Truly white-glove treatment from start to finish."

Catherine Liu

Entrepreneur
